google_workspace.d: Google Workspace services: email (Gmail), files (Drive), calendar. Serviços Google: e-mail, arquivos, agenda.

gmail.d: Gmail email service: read, search and send emails. Serviço de e-mail: ler, buscar e enviar mensagens.

read.d: Read emails from the inbox, newest first. Ler e-mails da caixa de entrada.

p.q: string:o::Gmail search query, ex: is:unread or from:joao (default is:unread)
p.m: number:o:10:max number of emails to return

query.d: Search emails by query and return lightweight matches. Buscar e-mails por consulta.

send.d: Send a new email. Enviar um novo e-mail.

drive.d: Google Drive files: list and read documents. Arquivos do Google Drive: listar e ler.

list.d: List files in Drive, optionally filtered. Listar arquivos do Drive.

read.d: Read the content of a Drive file by id. Ler o conteúdo de um arquivo.

delete.d: Permanently delete a Drive file by id. Apagar permanentemente um arquivo.

microsoft.d: Microsoft 365 services: Outlook email, OneDrive, Teams. Serviços Microsoft.

outlook.d: Outlook email service: read emails. Serviço de e-mail Outlook.

read.d: Read emails from the Outlook inbox. Ler e-mails do Outlook.

local.d: Local machine tools: filesystem access. Ferramentas locais: sistema de arquivos.

filesystem.d: Local filesystem: list directories and read files. Sistema de arquivos local.

list.d: List files in a local directory. Listar arquivos de um diretório.

read.d: Read a local text file. Ler um arquivo de texto local.

web.d: Web tools: search the internet. Ferramentas web: buscar na internet.

search.d: Web search engine. Mecanismo de busca na web.

run.d: Search the web and return top results. Buscar na web.
